message:
fix: clear stale 'Refresh failed' when cached data exists (#3282)

When CacheStore loads cached data from storage, it now clears the
persisted isFailed/consecutiveFailures state. Previously, if fetches
failed 3+ times in a prior session, the card would show "Refresh
failed" on next page load even though cached data was available —
confusing users into thinking the card was broken.

Also adds missing isRefreshing to NodeDebug card per card guidelines.

Closes #3281 (partial — NodeDebug only; other cards tracked separately)

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
